pages.title: Four in the Nether
pages.text: $(item)Tiberium$() — bright green crystal ore; drops $(item)Tiberium Crystals$(). Common in Nether rock.$(br)$(item)Prometheum$() — warm orange, firey visual, widespread.$(br)$(item)Valyrium$() — dark red, rare, deep pockets.$(br)$(item)Osram$() — luminous yellow ore; provides $(item)Osram$() fluid when melted — a glowstone-adjacent material.
